description: src/storage/session-tracker.ts recordSuccess() calls saveReview() then markSessionCompleted() as separate statements. If saveReview fails the session is still marked complete — producing inconsistent state where review_history returns no row but review_status reports completed. Wrap both in a single transaction via db.transaction(() => { ... })(). Acceptance: test with a mock saveReview that throws asserts the session is NOT marked complete. Source: docs/roadmap_1.1.md:158.
title: Atomicity for saveReview and markSessionCompleted
